title: 工具执行成功: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/turn_builder.py (第 238 至 351 行，共 351 行) ---
 238 |     def _estimate_tokens(self, messages: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> int:
 239 |         # Lightweight approximation: four chars per token, minimum one token.
 240 |         return max(1, sum(len(str(msg)) for msg in messages) // 4)
 241 | 
 242 |     def _estimate_importance(
 243 |         self,
 244 |         messages: List[Dict[str, Any]],
 245 |         categories: List[str],
 246 |         is_tool_pair_complete: bool,
 247 |         token_estimate: int,
 248 |         files_touched: List[str],
 249 |         errors: List[str],
 250 |         tests: List[str],
 251 |     ) -> float:
 252 |         score = 0.08
 253 |         text = self._messages_text(messages).lower()
 254 | 
 255 |         if any(msg.get("role") == "user" for msg in messages):
 256 |             score += 0.22
 257 |         if any(msg.get("tool_calls") for msg in messages):
 258 |             score += 0.10
 259 |         if files_touched:
 260 |             score += min(0.20, 0.06 * len(files_touched))
 261 |         if errors or "error" in categories:
 262 |             score += 0.30
 263 |         if tests or "test" in categories:
 264 |             score += 0.20
 265 |         if "planning" in categories:
 266 |             score += 0.16
 267 |         if "code_edit" in categories:
 268 |             score += 0.22
 269 |         if "command" in categories:
 270 |             score += 0.08
 271 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in self.SUCCESS_KEYWORDS):
 272 |             score += 0.06
 273 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in self.FAILURE_KEYWORDS):
 274 |             score += 0.08
 275 |         if "bulk_output" in categories:
 276 |             score -= 0.20
 277 |         if not is_tool_pair_complete:
 278 |             score -= 0.25
 279 | 
 280 |         # Very large turns are often file dumps/stdout; keep their metadata but
 281 |         # avoid letting size alone dominate keyframe selection.
 282 |         if token_estimate > 1200 and not ({"error", "test", "code_edit"} & set(categories)):
 283 |             score -= 0.12
 284 | 
 285 |         return max(0.0, min(1.0, round(score, 4)))
 286 | 
 287 |     def _categorize(self, messages: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[str]:
 288 |         text = self._messages_text(messages).lower()
 289 |         categories: List[str] = []
 290 | 
 291 |         if any(msg.get("tool_calls") or msg.get("role") == "tool" for msg in messages):
 292 |             categories.append("tool")
 293 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in self.ERROR_KEYWORDS):
 294 |             categories.append("error")
 295 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in self.TEST_KEYWORDS):
 296 |             categories.append("test")
 297 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in self.PLAN_KEYWORDS):
 298 |             categories.append("planning")
 299 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in self.FILE_EDIT_KEYWORDS):
 300 |             categories.append("code_edit")
 301 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in self.FILE_READ_KEYWORDS):
 302 |             categories.append("file_read")
 303 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in self.SEARCH_KEYWORDS):
 304 |             categories.append("search")
 305 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in self.COMMAND_KEYWORDS):
 306 |             categories.append("command")
 307 |         if self._looks_like_bulk_output(text):
 308 |             categories.append("bulk_output")
 309 | 
 310 |         return categories
 311 | 
 312 |     def _extract_files(self, messages: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[str]:
 313 |         files: List[str] = []
 314 |         for msg in messages:
 315 |             self._extract_files_from_obj(msg, files)
 316 |         normalized = [path.replace("\\", "/").strip("`'\"(),:;[]{}<>") for path in files]
 317 |         return list(dict.fromkeys(path for path in normalized if path))[:20]
 318 | 
 319 |     def _extract_files_from_obj(self...
